name: ScrapeNinja Web Scraping API
description: High-performance web scraping API with smart retries and proxy rotation, with multiple proxy geos, and with two scraping engines under the hood: high performance engine with Chrome browser TLS fingerprint, but without JavaScript execution and real browser overhead; and real Chrome browser engine, with JS and CSS evaluation and screenshots, when high performance engine features are not enough.
